meta.title: Ferritin-labelled Antibody Study of RD-114 Virus

abstractHtml: Comparative studies by the ferritin-labelled antibody technique showed differences between the surface antigens of RD-114 and feline leukaemia viruses (FeLV). Guinea pig and rabbit antisera to RD-114 virus reacted with RD-114 virus but not with FeLV. Dog antiserum to FeLV reacted with FeLV but not with RD-114 virus.
